memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Thomas Wheeler or Wheler
memoryArtifacts.description: Thomas Wheeler was knighted by King Henry Vii on June 16, 1487 for bravery at the battle of Stoke(Field) Simnel's Rebellion.  This was the last battle of the War of the Roses.  The battle was a victor …

memoryArtifacts.headline:
Sir Thomas Wheeler
(27 May 1465 – 27 May 1546)
memoryArtifacts.description:
NOTE: Thomas Wheler changed his name to Wheeler after being knighted. So did his half-brothers and that of their children.

Knighted 1487 by the King for bravery, 16 Jun 1487, battle of Stoke (field), …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Wheeler於1465年5月27日出生在英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德時，他的父親Henry Wheeler32歲，母親Mary Cole27歲。他於1490年與Joan Jane Buckingham在英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年5月27日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾文享年81歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Wheeler于1465年5月27日出生在英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德时，他的父亲Henry Wheeler32岁，母亲Mary Cole27岁。他于1490年与Joan Jane Buckingham在英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1546年5月27日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾文享年81岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Wheeler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a wheelwright, a maker of wheels (primarily for carts and other vehicles, but also other kinds of wheels, for use in spinning or other manufacturing processes), from Middle English wheler, whegheler, a derivative of Old English hweogol, hweowol, hwēol ‘wheel’.
History: A founder of Salisbury, NH, in 1634 was John Wheeler.

variants.name: Rower
meanings: English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French roer ‘wheelwright’ (Old French roier, rouwier, rouer, an agent derivative of roue ‘wheel’). Compare Wheeler .
English: occupational name from Middle English rouer(e) ‘rower, oarsman’. Compare Rother .

variants.name: Wheelwright
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English whelewright(e), whelrihte ‘wheelwright, maker of wheels and wheeled vehicles’ (Old English hwēol + wyrhta). See also Wheeler .

History: John Wheelwright (c. 1592–1679), clergyman, came to Boston, MA, from Lincolnshire, England in 1636. He was banished from Massachusettes for his support of his sister-in-law, Anne Hutchinson, in the antinomian controversy; he set up a community at Exeter, NH.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Wheeler was born on 27 May 1465, in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Henry Wheeler, was 32 and his mother, Mary Cole, was 27. He married Joan Jane Buckingham in 1490, in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 May 1546, in Wing, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Wheeler est né le 27 mai 1465, à Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Wheeler, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Cole, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan Jane Buckingham en 1490, à Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1546, à Wing, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Wheeler am 27. Mai 1465 in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Wheeler 32 und seine Mutter Mary Cole 27. Er hat 1490 in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England Joan Jane Buckingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1546 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Wing, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wheeler è nato il il 27 maggio 1465 nel Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Wheeler, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mary Cole, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joan Jane Buckingham nel 1490, nel Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 maggio 1546, nel Wing, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wheelerが1465年5月27日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドで生まれた時，父Henry Wheelerは32歳，母Mary Coleは27歳であった。1490年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドでJoan Jane Buckinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1546年5月27日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウィングで81歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Wheeler(이)가 1465년 5월 27일 영국 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wheeler(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Cole(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에서 Joan Jane Buckingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 5월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 윙에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.27 May 1465–27 May 1546: 27 de maio de 1465–27 de maio de 1546
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Wheeler nasceu em 27 de maio de 1465, em Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Wheeler, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary Cole, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Jane Buckingham em 1490, em Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1546, em Wing, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Wheeler родился 27 мая 1465 г. в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Wheeler было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Cole, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Jane Buckingham в 1490 г. в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 мая 1546 г. в местности виг, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.27 May 1465–27 May 1546: 27 de mayo de 1465–27 de mayo de 1546
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Wheeler nació el 27 de mayo de 1465, en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Wheeler, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mary Cole, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joan Jane Buckingham en 1490, en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1546, en Wing, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
